description: Exceptionally built END-UNIT ROWHOME by North Arc Properties with NO STRATA FEES. This spacious & meticulously maintained home shows like new and offers extensive upgrades throughout. Enjoy A/C, a chef-inspired kitchen w/ wine fridge and Fisher & Paykel appliances complemented by high-end finishes throughout. The professionally finished basement is ideal for guests or entertaining, showcasing a custom bar w/sink, wine storage, cabinetry & bar fridge, plus a developer-installed soundproofed bedroom. Well-sized bedrooms with potential to add 5th bedroom upstairs. Enjoy year-round outdoor living on the covered deck with gas BBQ hookup and custom awning. Rare 4-vehicle parking with double garage (epoxy floors) plus parking pad. A standout home offering privacy, space and luxury without strata.
